title: EQ - Select a value, kill the app, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ setting (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ) does not persist after app kill and reopen in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
5. Force close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe it away from the recent apps list or use Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Force Stop).
6. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
8. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
9. Repeat steps 1–8 for each remaining EQ value: Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ.
10. For Custom EQ, also verify that any custom frequency band adjustments persist after app kill and reopen.
expected: The EQ value selected before killing the app persists after reopening the app. This should hold true for all EQ values: Bass, Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ (including any custom band adjustments).
